summary: TheraVoca iter-7: full backend + frontend testing of patient-intake + matching-engine v2 rebuild. 23/23 backend pytest tests pass (seed v2 schema, all 6 hard filters, perfect-fit scoring near 100, send logic <=30 + threshold>=71 with 60/50 fallback, signup with new fields, patient re-rank, regression on auth/admin/portal). Frontend 7-step intake form renders, all transitions work, POST /api/requests returns 200 with new payload shape (presenting_issues:list, client_type, age_group, modality_preference, availability_windows, urgency, prior_therapy, style_preference, gender_required), and admin detail endpoint persists all new v2 fields.
critical_code_review_comments: matching.py _payment_pass: when patient pays cash but therapist has no cash_rate field, returns True (passthrough). Acceptable per spec (don't filter on missing data) but worth flagging if seed data drifts.

_deliver_results re-rank uses patient_rank_score internally for sort+email but the public /api/requests/{id}/results endpoint sorts only by match_score+created_at — so the patient-facing API doesn't reflect the re-rank blend. If FE consumes /results directly it will see match_score order, not blended order. Spec says delivery re-ranks; current public endpoint is inconsistent.
TherapistSignup model accepts modality_offering as free string with no Pydantic validation (telehealth|in_person|both) — invalid value would silently set telehealth/offers_in_person to False/False.
RequestCreate.presenting_issues max_length=5 but FE caps at 3 — server-side cap should also be 3 to match spec ('Pick up to 3').
Admin /admin/requests/{id}/resend-notifications works on un-verified requests — could be intentional (admin override) but worth confirming.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing 100 seed_v2 therapists. Created 2-3 transient TEST requests + 1 transient TEST therapist (rejected after test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7_intake_matching.py covers: SeedV2 schema (2), Request flow (2), HardFilters (8: state/couples/child/insurance/telehealth/in_person/gender_required/no_required), Scoring (2: perfect>=95, breakdown structure), Send logic (1), Therapist signup v2 (1), Patient re-rank (1), Regression (6). All pass in ~8s. Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7_intake_matching.py -v. Frontend tested via Playwright on landing-page IntakeForm (NOT a separate /intake route — it's embedded on Landing). Submit POST /api/requests returned 200, navigated to /verify/pending?id=...
